name: Ningxia Zhongyin Cashmere Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningxia Zhongyin Cashmere Co., Ltd. manufactures, sells, and exports cashmere products in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers woolen cashmere, worsted cashmere, linen, and special yarns; and woven cashmere, woven wool, knitted linen, woven linen, and woven blended fabrics. It also provides various garments, such as cashmere knitted, cashmere/wool knitted, and linen and blended knitwear garments; cashmere/PVA worsted and napping cashmere scarves and shawls; cashmere pilled-in selvedge fulling scarves; and woven blankets. The company offers its products under the Todd & Duncan, Brown Allan, and Philosofie brand names. In addition, it operates clothing stores and e-business Websites. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Lingwu, the People's Republic of China. Ningxia Zhongyin Cashmere Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Lingwu Zhongyin Cashmere Company Ltd.
